label: Wait for Call
description: Block execution until the SUT sends a request to the specified mock endpoint. Times out if no call arrives.

params.name: mock
params.description: Reference to a mock instance referenced in setup

params.name: timeout_s
params.description: Maximum seconds to wait before failing

outputs.name: request_method
outputs.description: HTTP method used in the received request

outputs.name: request_body
outputs.description: Body payload from the received request

outputs.name: query_params
outputs.description: Query parameters from the received request

outputs.name: elapsed_ms
outputs.description: Time in milliseconds between mock setup and request arrival
